---
name: test-failure-helper
version: 1.0.0
description: |
  Helps diagnose and fix failing tests. Analyzes test output, identifies the
  root cause of failures, and suggests fixes.
  Use when asked to "fix failing tests" or "why are my tests failing".
  Proactively suggest when tests fail, when the user sees an error, or
  when the user reports unexpected behavior.
allowed-tools:
  - Bash
  - Read
  - Edit
---

# test-failure-helper

Test failure diagnosis and repair.
